blended.narrative: Bromley is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,715 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
